title: Targetman
description: When trouble hits the fan, call Targetman. He’s dead on. Shot in 4-D and featuring the highest body count in movie history.
quote: Don’t lose your head over it. Oops, I guess you did.
alt1: robot birds with tanks and choppers taking over a city
alt2: Targetman shooting a giant gatling gun
alt3: Targetman flying through a car tunnel from an explosion
alt4: Targetman aiming his arm gun at you
